steps.t: Orkish war-banners can be found in Krul Lugu below Iavassúl's Watch. Iavassúl has asked you to destroy several of the Orcs' war-banners to demoralize …
Iavassúl is at Iavassúl's Watch, above Krul Lugu. You should return to Iavassúl and inform him that the Orkish banners have been destroyed.
